inputs.label: Applied Torque
inputs.businessContext: Torsion moment applied to the shaft

businessContext_i18n.en: Torsion moment applied to the shaft
businessContext_i18n.fr: Moment de torsion appliqué à l'arbre

inputs.label: Shaft Length
inputs.businessContext: Length of the shaft under torsion

businessContext_i18n.en: Length of the shaft under torsion
businessContext_i18n.fr: Longueur de l'arbre soumise à la torsion

inputs.label: Shear Modulus (G)
inputs.businessContext: Shear modulus of the material, e.g., steel ~80 GPa

businessContext_i18n.en: Shear modulus of the material, e.g., steel ~80 GPa
businessContext_i18n.tr: Malzemenin kayma modülü, örn. çelik ~80 GPa
businessContext_i18n.de: Schubmodul des Materials, z. B. Stahl ~80 GPa
businessContext_i18n.fr: Module de cisaillement du matériau, ex. acier ~80 GPa

inputs.label: Inner Diameter
inputs.businessContext: Inner diameter for hollow shafts; set to 0 for solid shafts

businessContext_i18n.en: Inner diameter for hollow shafts; set to 0 for solid shafts
businessContext_i18n.tr: İçi boş miller için iç çap; dolu miller için 0 girin
businessContext_i18n.de: Innendurchmesser für Hohlwellen; bei Vollwellen auf 0 setzen
businessContext_i18n.fr: Diamètre intérieur pour arbres creux ; mettre 0 pour arbres pleins
